design_philosophy.visual_style: Dark Luxury. High contrast between deep charcoal backgrounds and gold accents. Use of textures (leather, grain, steel) to avoid digital flatness.

headings.usage: Main section titles, Hero text, CTA buttons

body.notes: Chosen over Inter for its slightly more geometric/modern character which fits the 'Barber' aesthetic.

buttons.primary: rounded-sm px-8 py-3 bg-[#C8A96A] text-[#1F1F1F] font-bebas tracking-wider uppercase hover:bg-[#D9B875] transition-all duration-300 font-bold text-lg shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(200,169,106,0.2)]
buttons.outline: rounded-sm px-8 py-3 border border-[#C8A96A] text-[#C8A96A] font-bebas tracking-wider uppercase hover:bg-[#C8A96A] hover:text-[#1F1F1F] transition-all duration-300 font-bold text-lg
buttons.fixed_mobile: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 rounded-full w-14 h-14 bg-[#C8A96A] text-[#1F1F1F] flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg md:hidden animate-bounce-slow

cards.service_item: flex justify-between items-end border-b border-[#333333] pb-4 mb-4 hover:border-[#C8A96A] transition-colors group cursor-default
cards.feature_card: bg-[#252525] p-6 border border-[#333333] hover:border-[#C8A96A]/50 transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: bg-[#2A2A2A] border-[#333333] text-[#F5F5F5] focus:border-[#C8A96A] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C8A96A] placeholder:text-[#555] rounded-sm

layout_strategies.hero: Full height (min-h-screen). Background image with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/60). Centered content. Parallax effect on scroll.
layout_strategies.services: Two-column layout on desktop. 'Menu' style list. Use dotted leaders (flex-grow border-b border-dotted border-gray-700) between service name and price.
layout_strategies.gallery: Masonry grid or 'Bento' grid style. Mix of vertical and horizontal images. High contrast borders.
layout_strategies.booking_modal: Fixed centered modal. Dark theme. Steps: Service Selection -> Date -> Time -> Details. Use gold accent for selected states.

content_guidelines.tone: Use respectful, slightly formal but warm Spanish ('Usted' or polite 'Tú' depending on context, but prefer 'Te esperamos' - warm/close).

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle noise overlay to the entire body background to simulate film grain/texture. opacity-5 pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px borders with 10-20% opacity for separation. Avoid heavy shadows.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Use linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, #1F1F1F) on Hero image bottom to blend into the next section.

setup: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (#C8A96A, #1F1F1F, etc) and fonts.
Add imports for fonts in index.css (Bebas Neue, Playfair Display, Manrope).
page_structure: Create a LandingPage component that holds all sections.
Implement smooth scroll navigation (e.g., clicking 'Servicios' scrolls to #services).
Ensure the Booking Modal is accessible from the sticky header and the hero CTA.
specific_constraints: Do NOT use social media icons (per user request).
The 'Call' button must be fixed and visible on mobile screens at all times.
Use the provided customer assets for the main visual anchors.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
